---
title: "Privacy Policy"
slug: "privacy-policy"
publish: true
category: "reference"
status: "stable"
updated: 2026-04-08
owner: "team"
summary: "RenderBrains privacy policy covering data collection, use, and user rights."
---

**Effective Date:** 2026-04-08

## 1. Introduction

RenderBrains ("we", "our", "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting it through this Privacy Policy.

This policy describes how we collect, use, and disclose information when you use our games and services.

## 2. Information We Collect

### 2.1 Personal Information

We may collect limited personal information such as:

- Email address (if provided by user)
- Account identifiers

### 2.2 Non-Personal Information

We may collect:

- Device information (model, OS, identifiers)
- Gameplay data
- Usage analytics

## 3. How We Use Information

We use collected information to:

- Provide and improve our games
- Ensure proper functionality
- Analyze gameplay and user experience
- Prevent fraud and abuse

## 4. Third-Party Services

We may use third-party services such as:

- Analytics providers
- Advertising networks
- Payment processors

These services may collect information according to their own privacy policies.

## 5. Data Sharing

We do not sell personal data. We may share data:

- With service providers
- To comply with legal obligations
- To protect rights and safety

## 6. Data Security

We implement reasonable measures to protect your information. However, no system is completely secure.

## 7. Children's Privacy

Our services are not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children.

## 8. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have rights to:

- Access your data
- Request deletion
- Object to processing

## 9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy. Changes will be posted with an updated effective date.

## 10. Contact Us

If you have questions, contact us at: [contact@renderbrains.com](mailto:contact@renderbrains.com)
